info.name: economizai
info.description: API collection for the economizai backend (NFC-e collaborative price intelligence). Maintain in sync with every endpoint change. The 'E2E Flow' folder runs all requests in logical order — each request seeds variables for the next.

variable.description: Set this to a real NFC-e QR string (full SEFAZ URL or pipe-separated p= value) before running the receipt steps.

item.name: Reset password (consume token from email or [DEV-MODE] log)
Verify email (consume token from email or [DEV-MODE] log)
Remove a member (kick — moves them to a fresh solo household)
Confirm receipt with item exclusions (only mine)
Delete receipt (frees the chave for re-import within the same household)
Add alias to product (links unmatched items)
Categorizer
item.description: ML classifier status + manual triggers. Authenticated.

item.name: Price index (collaborative)
item.description: K-anonymity-protected aggregates. Will return empty until enough households contribute.

item.name: Markets
item.description: Market catalogue (visited + watched + nearby) and the user's watchlist of CNPJs to monitor regardless of distance.

item.name: Consumption (Phase 3)
item.description: Predictive purchase intelligence per household — when products will run out, suggested shopping list. Volume-gated: products with fewer than 2 prior purchases are silently skipped.

item.name: Suggested shopping list with upcoming items
Log manual purchase (Já comprei sem nota)
Shopping list (PRO-52)
item.description: Multi-market basket optimization. Greedy heuristic — for each item picks the cheapest known market (local history first, community index fallback), then groups items per market.

item.name: Shopping lists (persistent)
item.description: Real per-household shopping lists — build, edit, check off as you shop. Items can reference a canonical Product OR be free text.

item.name: Notifications (inbox)
item.description: User-facing inbox for notifications generated by the app (promo alerts, etc).

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: App-open snapshot — bundles spend + recent receipts + suggested list + community promos + unread count.

item.name: Preferences (Phase 2.6)
item.description: Auto-derived per-household pack-size and brand preferences. Volume-gated: a generic with fewer than 5 confirmed purchases is silently skipped.

item.name: E2E Flow
item.description: Sequential test suite — run top to bottom. Each step seeds variables for the next. Steps 9+ require a real NFC-e QR payload in the {{qrPayload}} collection variable; otherwise they will report parsing/fetch errors but won't break the auth/household flow.

exec: pm.request.body.raw = JSON.stringify({ name: 'E2E Test User', email: email, password: 'password123', acceptedTermsVersion: '1.0', acceptedPrivacyVersion: '1.0' });
pm.test('Response has token, default FREE tier, contributionOptIn=true', function () {
pm.test('Returns 200 with new password', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: 7. Login with old password should fail

exec: pm.test('Has invite code and current user as member', function () {

item.name: 9. Submit NFC-e QR (requires real qrPayload variable)

exec: pm.test.skip('qrPayload not set — skipping receipt steps');
pm.test('Has at least one item', function () { pm.expect(d.items.length).to.be.at.least(1); });
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eReceiptId')) { pm.test.skip('No receipt id — skipping'); return; }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eReceiptItemId')) { pm.test.skip('No item id — skipping'); return; }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eReceiptId')) { pm.test.skip('No receipt id — skipping'); return; }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eReceiptId')) { pm.test.skip('No receipt id — skipping'); return; }
if (!qr || qr.indexOf('PASTE_REAL') === 0) { pm.test.skip('qrPayload not set — skipping'); return; }

item.name: 17. Create canonical product (uses first unmatched item)

exec: var body = { normalizedName: 'E2E Canonical Product', category: 'GROCERIES', unit: 'UN' };
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eProductId')) { pm.test.skip('No product id — skipping'); return; }

item.name: 25. Reference price (k-anon protected, often empty with low data)

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eProductId')) { pm.test.skip('No product id — skipping'); return; }
pm.test('Returns 200 (200 even when k-anon hides data)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eProductId')) { pm.test.skip('No product id — skipping'); return; }
pm.test('Has user + household + receipts in export', function () {

item.name: 31. Pin market to watchlist (uses first market from catalogue)

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eMarketCnpj')) { pm.test.skip('No market available — skipping'); return; }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eMarketCnpj')) { pm.test.skip('No market available — skipping'); return; }
pm.test('Pinned market is in the watchlist', function () {
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eMarketCnpj')) { pm.test.skip('No market available — skipping'); return; }
pm.test('Returns an array (often empty until 3+ purchases per product)', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: 36. Derived household preferences (often empty until 5+ purchases per generic)

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eProductId')) { pm.test.skip('No product id — skipping'); return; }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eProductId')) { pm.test.skip('No product id — skipping'); return; }

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('e2eProductId')) { pm.test.skip('No product id — skipping'); return; }
